query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Bureau for Medical Services member application page for live Medicaid coverage and application routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: Applying for Healthcare: Medicaid, West Virginia Children's Health Insurance Program or Private Insurance at the Health Insurance Marketplace. There isn’t just one type of Medicaid but several.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Bureau for Medical Services HCBS waivers page for live waiver program evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: A Medicaid waiver does not have the same rules that normally apply to the Medicaid program. For Medicaid members living at home, like seniors, people with disabilities, and children with serious emotional disorders who require assistance, there are four waiver programs available.

query_basis: Reviewed the live first-party Disability Rights of West Virginia homepage in browser mode because the raw fetch path was too script-heavy for stable text extraction.

samples.sample_name: Disability Rights of West Virginia homepage
samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights of West Virginia (DRWV) is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for people with disabilities in West Virginia. DRWV is a private, nonprofit agency. Our services are confidential and free of charge.

query_basis: Rechecked the inherited first-party WVPTI domain to confirm whether a live PTI designation page still exists.
blocker_evidence: Rechecked 2026-06-25 the inherited WVPTI first-party host. The legacy domain now returns HTTP 301 to an unrelated body-shop site, and no current first-party West Virginia PTI designation page was preserved in this bounded official-source pass. West Virginia therefore cannot stay COMPLETE because the PTI family no longer has live first-party evidence.
